topics.label: Design Solutions for Organizational Complexity
topics.description: Architecting and governing multi-account AWS environments at enterprise scale. Covers AWS Organizations, Service Control Policies (SCPs), AWS Control Tower, account vending, AWS Resource Access Manager (RAM), cross-account IAM roles, landing zones, consolidated billing, and federated identity.

examScenarios.title: Multi-account governance with Control Tower
examScenarios.prompt: An enterprise wants to provision new AWS accounts automatically with security baselines pre-applied. Design a solution using AWS Control Tower that enforces mandatory guardrails and allows optional guardrails per OU.
examScenarios.focus: Account Factory, preventive vs. detective guardrails, OU hierarchy design

examScenarios.title: Cross-account resource sharing with RAM
examScenarios.prompt: A networking team owns shared VPCs in a central account and wants application teams in spoke accounts to launch resources into those VPCs without full VPC creation permissions. Design the sharing and permission model.
examScenarios.focus: AWS RAM resource shares, VPC subnet sharing, cross-account IAM

topics.label: Design for New Solutions
topics.description: Designing greenfield architectures for complex enterprise workloads. Covers microservices patterns (ECS, EKS, Lambda), event-driven architectures (EventBridge, SQS, SNS, Kinesis), API Gateway, Step Functions, caching strategies, database selection (RDS, Aurora, DynamoDB, Redshift, Neptune, ElastiCache), and disaster recovery strategies (RTO/RPO, pilot light, warm standby, multi-site active/active).

studyPointers.label: Disaster Recovery of Workloads on AWS

examScenarios.title: Event-driven order processing pipeline
examScenarios.prompt: Design a scalable, loosely coupled order processing system where orders from multiple channels fan out to inventory, payments, and fulfillment services with guaranteed delivery and replay capability.
examScenarios.focus: SNS fan-out, SQS dead-letter queues, EventBridge event buses, Kinesis for replay

examScenarios.title: Disaster recovery with aggressive RTO/RPO
examScenarios.prompt: A financial services workload running in us-east-1 requires an RPO of 15 minutes and an RTO of 1 hour. Design the most cost-effective DR strategy that meets these constraints.
examScenarios.focus: Warm standby vs. pilot light, Aurora Global Database, Route 53 health checks, RDS read replicas

topics.label: Continuous Improvement for Existing Solutions
topics.description: Optimizing and evolving production architectures using the AWS Well-Architected Framework. Covers performance efficiency, cost optimization at scale, operational excellence, reliability patterns, observability (CloudWatch Logs Insights, X-Ray, CloudWatch Container Insights), AWS Config conformance packs, and Systems Manager operational runbooks.

examScenarios.title: Cost optimization for a Lambda-heavy workload
examScenarios.prompt: A team has 500 Lambda functions deployed across 3 accounts. Identify and implement cost reduction strategies without degrading performance or reliability.
examScenarios.focus: Compute Optimizer, right-sizing memory, Graviton, reserved concurrency, Cost Explorer

examScenarios.title: Distributed tracing across microservices
examScenarios.prompt: An ECS-based microservices application has intermittent latency spikes that are difficult to attribute to a specific service. Design an observability solution to isolate root causes.
examScenarios.focus: X-Ray service maps, sampling rules, CloudWatch Container Insights, Logs Insights correlation

topics.label: Accelerate Workload Migration and Modernization
topics.description: Planning and executing large-scale migrations and modernization initiatives. Covers AWS Migration Evaluator, Application Discovery Service, Database Migration Service (DMS), Server Migration Service (SMS), DataSync, Snow family, and modernization patterns including lift-and-shift, re-platform, and re-architect. Also covers VMware Cloud on AWS and container-based modernization strategies.

studyPointers.label: AWS Database Migration Service User Guide

examScenarios.title: Heterogeneous database migration
examScenarios.prompt: Migrate an on-premises Oracle database (5 TB, 99.9% availability SLA) to Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL with minimal downtime. Design the migration strategy and tools.
examScenarios.focus: DMS with Schema Conversion Tool, continuous replication, cutover planning, validation

examScenarios.title: Large-scale data center exit
examScenarios.prompt: A company must exit a physical data center within 6 months. 200 servers need migration, including 20 TB of NFS file shares and several Oracle databases. Design the phased migration plan.
examScenarios.focus: Application Discovery Service, Migration Hub, Server Migration Service, DataSync, Snow family decision criteria
